name: Art Ohlgren Recreational Area
description: Art Ohlgren Recreational Area is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Moose Lake, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Carlton Lofts
description: Carlton Lofts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cloquet, MN. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Churchill
description: Come play pickleball at Churchill in Cloquet, MN! There are 5 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Riverside Arena
description: Riverside Arena is a place to play pickleball in Moose Lake, MN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are private.

name: Sunnyside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Sunnyside Park in Cloquet, MN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
